era_context: Middle Bronze Age; 12th Dynasty Egypt under Amenemhat III. Old Babylonian Mesopotamia. Hittite Old Kingdom in Anatolia. Mature Harappan civilization in the Indus Valley. Early Shang dynasty in China (traditional dating).
disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed.
historiographic_note: 1875 BCE is not marked by any known specific event in the surviving historical record. This year continues the pattern of the preceding years: it falls within the reign of Amenemhat III but is not documented as a year of particular historical significance. The Bronze Age historical record, even for well-documented regions like Egypt, does not support reliable year-by-year granularity. Most events are dated to reigns or broader periods, and absolute chronologies for this era remain debated among scholars.
